title: cyclosorus euryphyllus
intro: Cyclosorus euryphyllus, also known as the Chinese Leptosporangiate fern, is a type of plant species in the family Thelypteridaceae, commonly found in tropical regions. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyclosorus euryphyllus include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as promoting wound healing and improving digestion. Herbal preparations of Cyclosorus euryphyllus include decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
